archimate:BusinessCollaboration.name: Digital Public Service Delivery Model
archimate:BusinessCollaboration.documentation:
Definition: Digital Public Service Delivery Model ABB is a Business Collaboration representing a collection of concepts related to the way in which the public sector delivers digital technologies to citizens and businesses.
Source: OECD
Source reference: https://www.oecd-ilibrary.org/docserver/gov_glance-2017-72-en.pdf?expires=1649771036&id=id&accname=guest&checksum=15BFD2F7E916921236CCF160605A6430
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): OECD Public service design and delivery in the digital age (https://www.oecd-ilibrary.org/sites/3252a73a-en/index.html?itemId=/content/component/3252a73a-en)
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Organisational view
Viewpoint: Highlevel viewpoint
Interoperability Saliency: Digital Public Service Delivery Model ABB is salient for organizational and behavioural interoperability due to it permits to (i) reuse and share common digital services across different public administrations to deploy and publish digital services, (ii) establish common business procedures to elaborate and form the digital services for public administration, (iii) the maintenance procedures to make available such digital services.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalPublicServiceDeliveryModelBusinessCollaboration
ABB name: eira:DigitalPublicServiceDeliveryModelBusinessCollaboration
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalPublicServiceDeliveryModelBusinessCollaboration
Interoperability Layer: Organisational

properties.value: Digital Public Service Delivery Model ABB is a Business Collaboration representing a collection of concepts related to the way in which the public sector delivers digital technologies to citizens and businesses.

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): OECD Public service design and delivery in the digital age (https://www.oecd-ilibrary.org/sites/3252a73a-en/index.html?itemId=/content/component/3252a73a-en)

Digital Public Service Delivery Model ABB is salient for organizational and behavioural interoperability due to it permits to (i) reuse and share common digital services across different public administrations to deploy and publish digital services, (ii) establish common business procedures to elaborate and form the digital services for public administration, (iii) the maintenance procedures to make available such digital services.
Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
